result.summary: Docsie exposes a documented HTTP Partner API and an MCP server at app.docsie.io; both appear to require authentication, with docs indicating API-key auth for the API and OAuth-gated access for MCP.
result.description: Docsie is a documentation and knowledge platform that turns videos, files, and other source material into structured documentation, training content, and knowledge portals. It also provides hosted help-center and content management capabilities for teams publishing internal or customer-facing docs.

docsie_api_key.label: Docsie API key
docsie_api_key.setup: In the Docsie app's Video-to-Docs workspace settings, open **API Keys** and create a token. The app states these keys are used to call the Docsie Video-to-Docs API, and notes that API keys unlock after your first generation finishes provisioning your Docsie organization. Start from [Video-to-Docs onboarding/settings](https://app.docsie.io/onboarding/v3-1/video-to-docs/).
